# NIP-34 Reference Card

### REFERENCE_CARD
NIP-34: Git collaboration on Nostr. 
- kind: 30617: Repository announcement. 
  - Required tags: d (<repo-id>).
  - Optional tags: name, description, web, clone, relays, r (<earliest-unique-commit-id>), maintainers, t (personal-fork or hashtags).
- kind: 30618: Repository state announcement.
  - Required tags: d (<repo-id>).
  - Optional tags: refs (multiple), HEAD.
- kind: 1617: Patch.
  - Required tags: a (repository announcement), r (<earliest-unique-commit-id-of-repo>).
